title: New journal backend!
body:
I've completed a new version of Plate and with this I've decided to re-make the way this post system works. Now, pages are static and can be accessed individually instead of being dropdowns on the main site. This has greatly improved page loading as the size of the page has now increased drastically now that content isn't stored on the main page. These pages can now be shared easily..

Thanks!

title: TRCS highlight
body:
TRCS is my low-level cross-platform semi-relay server! Check it out!

Thanks!

title: Updated DWM photos
body:
I've been using DWM for a while. I've been using github for hosting (x3hy/dwm), Finally I got around to adding some images to the repo. My dwm config is fully intergrated with the hellwal color generator which allows my system to change themes based off of the wallpaper coloring. Currently I have hellwal set in oposite colors which gives a complementary set of colors to the background, I think this works quite well. Here are two screenshots showing two different wallpapers: Check out the full repo here.

Thanks for reading!
